caption: A man with a shaved head, a full dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm is seated in a recording studio against a backdrop of black acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a plain white t-shirt. A professional microphone, mounted on a boom arm, is positioned directly in front of him. The boom arm features white text that reads "Rode Podcast". As the sequence progresses, the man speaks and gestures with his hands to emphasize his points. He begins by looking slightly off-camera with a small smile, then opens his mouth wider and raises his left hand in a sweeping motion. In the final moments, he looks forward, momentarily pauses with a neutral expression, and then opens his mouth in an exaggerated expression of surprise or excitement while raising his left hand again.
